title: narcissus papyraceus subsp. polyanthos
intro: Narcissus papyraceus subsp. polyanthos, also known as the paperwhite narcissus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae, characterized by its white blooms and papyraceous (paper-like) leaves. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its alkaloids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Narcissus papyraceus subsp. polyanthos include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often dried and used as a natural remedy, and its essential oil is also extracted for its medicinal properties.
